title: isodon interruptus
intro: Isodon interruptus, also known as Himalayan isodon or interrupted isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isodon interruptus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Isodon interruptus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and made into capsules or powders for convenient consumption.
